description_for_model: DECIMA-8 neuromorphic engine specification. Deterministic rhythm for Emulator→PCB→FPGA→ASIC. Key concepts: Level16 (0..15) on 8 physical lanes, BUS16 with honest summing, Tile-based programmable fabric, Range fuse [thr_lo..thr_hi] with hardware latch, Decay-to-zero (no residual state), Activation graph (Gating) with BUS_R flag, Access inheritance (descendants accumulate from zero if ancestor unfuses), Dedicated Pattern ID uint16 lane, Two-phase READ/WRITE discipline, Bake TLV binary format, UDP protocol for machine cascading. v0.2 DESIGN FREEZE.

domains.name: Architecture
domains.description: Tile model, BUS16 physics, READ/WRITE phases, routing and activation graph with gating
